external_references.description: Gallagher, S., Gn, S. (2020, December 16). Ransomware operators use SystemBC RAT as off-the-shelf Tor backdoor. Retrieved May 16, 2025.
Truman, D. (2024, January 19). Inside the SYSTEMBC Command-and-Control Server. Retrieved June 18, 2025.

objects.description: [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has downloaded additional files for execution on the victim’s machine.(Citation: SophosGnGal_SystemBC_Dec2020)(Citation: TrumanKroll_SYSTEMBCServer_Jan2024) The server component of [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has the ability to send additional files to victim machines.(Citation: TrumanKroll_SYSTEMBCServer_Jan2024)
